TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Taywan_Yiyang_Sayiun, title = Taywan_Yiyang_Sayiun, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Taywan_Yiyang_Sayiun} }

S.FORM: Taywan Yiyang Sayiunnganganː ci Taywan ku ngangan u etulː u tatama u nalecuhan ː 2010.2.15 u minalu(niyazu') ː Ciwidiyan, Kalingku a kuwan wamaː ci Sayan Tiway Sayun winaː ci Hong Mansan sabamaː ci Kilang Sayan Sayun kawawː micudaday
S.PHON: tajwan jijaŋ sajiunŋaŋan* ʦi tajwan ku ŋaŋan u ətur~ɾ* u tatama u nar~ɾəʦuħan * ****.*.** u minar~ɾu(nijazuʔ~ʡ) * ʦiwidijan, kar~ɾiŋku a kuwan wama* ʦi sajan tiwaj sajun wina* ʦi ħoŋ mansan sabama* ʦi kir~ɾaŋ sajan sajun kawaw* miʦudadaj
S.FORM: Taywan Yiyang Sayiunnganganː ci Taywan ku ngangan u etulː u tatama u nalecuhan ː 2010.2.15 u minalu(niyazu') ː Ciwidiyan, Kalingku a kuwan wamaː ci Sayan Tiway Sayun winaː ci Hong Mansan sabamaː ci Kilang Sayan Sayun kawawː micudaday
S.PHON: tajwan jijaŋ sajiunŋaŋan* ʦi tajwan ku ŋaŋan u ətur~ɾ* u tatama u nar~ɾəʦuħan * ****.*.** u minar~ɾu(nijazuʔ~ʡ) * ʦiwidijan, kar~ɾiŋku a kuwan wama* ʦi sajan tiwaj sajun wina* ʦi ħoŋ mansan sabama* ʦi kir~ɾaŋ sajan sajun kawaw* miʦudadaj
